description: Exclusively launched on AtlantisChain — the world’s ONLY ultra-super-fast Layer-0 blockchain with 3,600,000 TPS and 0.031-second block time — 7 Stolen Dogs Coin (7DOGS) is inspired by the viral story of a brave corgi leading six dogs on a heroic journey of loyalty, unity, and survival. 7DOGS empowers its holders and traders with instant finality, ultra-low fixed gas fees, and AI contract capability, delivering a fast, resilient, and community-driven digital asset worldwide.
name: 7 Stolen Dogs Coin
